commands.review_summary:
The PR changes agent exec script preflight to recursively inspect sudo/env/exec and shell-wrapper carrier chains, adds a fail-closed branch when no script was validated, and adds regression tests for readable carrier-wrapped Python/Node scripts.

PR surface: Source +78, Tests +79. Total +157 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main only detects direct env-prefixed interpreter script targets, while the PR demonstrates carrier chains but still misses no-script-validated carrier fallback and path-qualified interpreter cases. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and the remaining exec security-boundary fixes plus fail-closed compatibility choice should be accepted before merge.

target.title: FAD-1481 harden exec script preflight carriers
target.body:
## Summary
- Recursively unwrap command carriers such as sudo/env/exec and shell wrappers before exec script preflight validation
- Catch shell-bleed patterns in Python/Node scripts even when launched through carrier/wrapper chains
- Add regression coverage for sudo option values, env modifiers, env -S, and nested carrier + shell wrapper forms

## Verification
- RED: with implementation reverted, targeted new tests failed by reaching sudo/env execution instead of preflight rejection
- GREEN: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec.script-preflight.test.ts -t "carrier option values before execution|clustered sudo/env shell wrappers"`
- FULL TARGETED: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec.script-preflight.test.ts`
- Typecheck: `CI=true pnpm tsgo:core:test` and `CI=true pnpm tsgo:extensions:test` passed individually after combined `CI=true pnpm check:test-types` was SIGKILLed during the extensions phase

Ticket: FAD-1481
target.author: spencer2211
